---
title: "compile_session_traces.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/compile_session_traces.py"
loc: 104
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.48
overall_score: 2.61
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TraceAnalyzer, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TraceAnalyzer and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [glob](file://glob)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [datetime](file://datetime)

### Exports
- `TraceAnalyzer`
- `__init__`
- `get_summary`
- `_group_by_persona`
- `_get_top_performer`
- `ReportRenderer`
- `__init__`
- `render`
- `TraceCompiler`
- `execute`
